prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, landscape orientation
Primary request: Deadlands / Weird West inspired world map for the terrain type single_continent.
Scene/backdrop: one huge primary continent surrounded by ocean, continent-scale geography, sun-baked desert badlands, haunted canyons, prairie frontiers, mesas, dry salt flats, ghost-rock mine claims, frontier towns and rail stations, sacred spirit lands, flooded maze-like western coast, ominous supernatural regions.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated atlas and frontier cartography style, sepia parchment, inked coastlines, hand-painted terrain relief, ghost-rock steam-tech details, supernatural western horror mood.
Composition/framing: wide landscape atlas view, the single continent fills most of the frame with surrounding seas and small offshore fragments; include a compass rose, rail-line symbols, mine symbols, subtle territorial borders and map ornaments without readable text.
Geography constraints: large world map crossing many climates and biomes; complex realistic coastline with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, capes, deltas, canyons and river systems; mountain ranges should shape rain shadows and deserts; add irregular inland seas and frontier river basins.
Avoid: modern satellite look, clean fantasy theme-park layout, simple oval continent, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
